subtitles.original: ね。会場はカナデビアホールです！
subtitles.english: And the venue is Kanadevia Hall!

subtitles.original: もうね、4月の末にホロックスライブがありまして
subtitles.english: We had the holoX Live at the end of April,

subtitles.original: そして9月にね、ポックスがありまして
subtitles.english: then Nepox in September,

subtitles.original: そして12月に鷹嶺ルイのソロライブがあるということで
subtitles.english: and now in December, I'll have my solo live!

subtitles.original: 1年ね、2026年はすごい楽しめる
subtitles.english: This whole year of 2026 is going to be

subtitles.original: 年になるんじゃないですか？ルイ友さん。
subtitles.english: an incredibly fun year, don't you think, Luitomo?

subtitles.original: はい。ということで、ルイ友さんにはね、色々お話ししたことがあると思うんですけれども
subtitles.english: So, I think I've mentioned this to you all before,

subtitles.original: 私は前々からですね、今まで音楽活動を
subtitles.english: but for a long time, through my musical activities,

subtitles.original: えー、で、道を作ってきてくれた先輩。そら先輩だったり
subtitles.english: seeing the seniors who paved the way, like Sora-senpai,

subtitles.original: すいちゃん、あずちゃん、そしてわため、そしてカリ先輩のようにですね
subtitles.english: Sui-chan, AZ-chan, Watame, and Calli-senpai,

subtitles.original: ファーストライブから少しずつ、段階、階段を上がっていって
subtitles.english: I've always admired the story of starting from a first live

subtitles.original: 広い会場でソロライブをするという、そんな物語に憧れていました。
subtitles.english: and gradually climbing the steps to a massive venue.

subtitles.original: だから、もし私がライブをやることになった際には
subtitles.english: So, if I ever got to do lives,

subtitles.original: ファースト、セカンド、サード、フォースと
subtitles.english: I wanted to do a first, second, third, and fourth live,

subtitles.original: 順々に会場を大きくしていって
subtitles.english: gradually increasing the venue size,

subtitles.original: ゆくゆくはアリーナという夢を叶えたい。
subtitles.english: and eventually fulfilling my dream of an arena live.

subtitles.original: はい。そう思っていて、ルイ友さんには常々お伝えをしていたと思います。
subtitles.english: Yes, that's what I thought, and I've always shared this with you.

subtitles.original: そのためにね、定期的なソロライブができる活動を頑張りたいなと思って
subtitles.english: To make that happen, I wanted to work hard on regular solo lives,

subtitles.original: 今まで努力をしてきました。そしてこれからもします！
subtitles.english: and I've put in the effort. I'll keep working hard!

subtitles.original: 最近のホロライブはですね、結構
subtitles.english: Recently, hololive has been holding concerts

subtitles.original: より多くの方が入る会場での開催が多くて
subtitles.english: mostly in venues that accommodate a lot of people,

subtitles.original: 私の夢はちょっと難しいのかなとは、思っていたんですけれども
subtitles.english: so I wondered if my dream might be a bit difficult...

subtitles.original: こうやって、私の夢を理解してくださり、叶えるべく
subtitles.english: But they understood my dream, and to help me achieve it,

subtitles.original: まずは私の希望だったカナデビアホールにて
subtitles.english: first, they are letting me hold my first live

subtitles.original: ファーストライブをやらせていただくことになりました！おめでとう、ありがとう！
subtitles.english: at my dream venue, Kanadevia Hall! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: そして、あのトレンドもありがとうございます。ありがとうございます。
subtitles.english: And thank you for getting me on the trending list as well!

subtitles.original: ここからが鷹嶺ルイの新章の
subtitles.english: This marks the beginning of a new chapter,

subtitles.original: 新章の物語の始まりでございます。
subtitles.english: a new story for Takane Lui.

subtitles.original: まずはファーストライブを開催してから、次を考えるべきだとは思うんですけれども
subtitles.english: I know I should probably get through the first live before thinking about the next step,

subtitles.original: 私はセカンド、サード、フォース
subtitles.english: but I've already thought ahead to the second, third, fourth,

subtitles.original: その先のライブへのビジョンまで考えております！
subtitles.english: and the vision for lives beyond that!

subtitles.original: 今回の生誕ライブのタイトルでもあるように
subtitles.english: Just like the title of this birthday live,

subtitles.original: ルミナスステアーズ、輝かしい階段を駆け上がるために
subtitles.english: to run up the 'Luminous Stairs'—the brilliant staircase,

subtitles.original: そして、一緒にこの物語を紡いでいくために
subtitles.english: and to weave this story together with you,

subtitles.original: 少しでも行きたいなと思ってくださった方は
subtitles.english: if you feel even a slight desire to come,

subtitles.original: 次に繋げるために、応募したりライブを見てくれると嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: I'd be so happy if you applied or watched to help pave the way!

subtitles.original: ライブのタイトルは、リベリオンになっております。
subtitles.english: The title of the live is 'REBELLION'.

subtitles.original: はい、リベリオンです。
subtitles.english: Yes, Rebellion.

subtitles.original: はい、反逆という意味でございます。
subtitles.english: Yes, it carries the meaning of 'rebellion'.

subtitles.original: 私がいつも抱えてる不安や、そして色々な否定の声
subtitles.english: The anxieties I always carry, the various critical voices,

subtitles.original: そして、私自身の葛藤
subtitles.english: and my own inner conflicts—

subtitles.original: これからも私は、それを私の歌で反逆していきたい。
subtitles.english: I want to rebel against all of that through my songs.

subtitles.original: そんな気持ちで、込めて、つけさせていただきました。
subtitles.english: With those feelings in mind, I chose this title.

subtitles.original: 最高のライブになるようにたくさん準備をしていますので
subtitles.english: I'm preparing extensively to make this the best live ever,

subtitles.original: ぜひ楽しみに待っていてください！
subtitles.english: so please look forward to it!

subtitles.original: はい、ここからまた新たに鷹嶺ルイの物語が始まるということで
subtitles.english: Yes, with my story starting anew from here,

subtitles.original: アーティスト写真を作りました！こちらです。
subtitles.english: we made new artist photos! Here they are.

subtitles.original: はい、めちゃくちゃかっこいいですね。かっこかわいい。
subtitles.english: Yes, they are incredibly cool. Cool and cute.

subtitles.original: はい、アーティスト活動の際には
subtitles.english: I plan to use these during my artist activities,

subtitles.original: こちら使っていこうかなと思っておりますので、よろしくお願いいたします。
subtitles.english: so please look forward to seeing them.

subtitles.original: かつ、ここまでファースト、セカンド、アコースティックとアルバムを作ってきましたが
subtitles.english: And while I've released my first, second, and acoustic albums,

subtitles.original: 今回、ライブを盛り上げるために
subtitles.english: this time, to get everyone hyped for the live,

subtitles.original: 4曲、新しく作りまして
subtitles.english: I've newly created 4 songs!

subtitles.original: 収録させていただいたミニアルバムも本日ライブ終了後に予約開始です！
subtitles.english: The recorded mini-album will be available for pre-order right after the live!

subtitles.original: ね。たくさん曲がありますね、鷹嶺ルイ。
subtitles.english: Right? I have so many songs now, don't I?

subtitles.original: はい、えー、「LEGENDARY」というタイトルをつけさせていただきましたミニアルバムでございます。
subtitles.english: Yes, I've titled this mini-album 'LEGENDARY'.

subtitles.original: この後に披露する新曲も入っております。
subtitles.english: It also includes the new song I'll perform later.

subtitles.original: えー、完全生産限定盤には、全員に、サインがつきます。
subtitles.english: And the Limited Edition comes with a signature for everyone.

subtitles.original: 完全生産限定盤には全員に、直筆サインがつきますので
subtitles.english: Yes, the Limited Edition features a hand-signed autograph for everyone,

subtitles.original: ぜひ
subtitles.english: so please get it!

subtitles.original: 日頃の感謝を込めてサインを書きますので、ぜひ予約してください。
subtitles.english: I'll sign them with all my gratitude, so please pre-order!

subtitles.original: お求めやすい通常盤もあります。こちらはちょっとサインついてないんですけど
subtitles.english: We also have an affordable Regular Edition, though it doesn't have a signature.

subtitles.original: 通常盤もございますので、ぜひお手元にとっていただけますと嬉しいです。
subtitles.english: We have the Regular Edition too, so I'd love for you to get a copy.

subtitles.original: 今回のライブ、そして、この後に予約開始される
subtitles.english: The hashtag for this live and the mini-album

subtitles.original: ミニアルバムのハッシュタグは共通で、「#鷹嶺ルイの反逆」となっております。
subtitles.english: available for pre-order afterward will be '#TakaneLuiNoHangyaku'.

subtitles.original: 皆さんたくさんポストして盛り上げてくださいね。
subtitles.english: Please post a lot to build up the excitement!

subtitles.original: ビジュよいっしょ。ビジュよいよね。
subtitles.english: The visuals are great, right? They look really good.

subtitles.original: 以上、ソロライブとミニアルバムの告知でした。
subtitles.english: That's all for the solo live and mini-album announcements.

subtitles.original: まだ、お知らせはございます。
subtitles.english: But wait, we have even more news!

subtitles.original: はい、お知らせと重大告知がございます。
subtitles.english: Yes, we have announcements and major news!

subtitles.original: 次はお待ちかねのグッズ紹介です！はい、こちら。
subtitles.english: Next is the long-awaited merchandise intro! Here it is.

subtitles.original: 鷹嶺ルイ誕生日記念2026ということで
subtitles.english: This is the Takane Lui Birthday Celebration 2026!

responses.thoughts:
**My Thoughts on the Current Project**

Okay, here's what's running through my mind as I approach this transcription and translation project. I need to deliver subtitles for this video segment, accurately syncing them to Takane Lui's speech.

The video runs up to the 5-minute mark, so that's the scope. First, I'll transcribe her Japanese speech precisely, timecode it accurately. Then, I'll translate it to English.

Here's how I am breaking this down:

She begins with a clear announcement of the live venue: Kanadevia Hall. She then speaks about past events like the holoX Live, and Nepox, with her upcoming solo live in December. I'll make sure to note "Nepox," as it's the correct name of the event.

She also mentioned how 2026 is going to be a great year, given all the events coming up.

Then she discusses how she is inspired by her seniors, mentioning Sora, Sui, AZKi, Watame, and most importantly, Calli-senpai who paved the way. I'll make sure that's correct.

She shares her dream of gradually scaling up venues, from a first live to a massive arena. She clearly stated that she wished to do four lives, in succession. It is my responsibility to make sure the timecodes are perfect.

She emphasizes her commitment to achieving regular solo lives. She talks about how hololive is now holding concerts in bigger venues and initially, she was concerned about her dream's feasibility, but now, it is finally coming true.

She's grateful for the opportunity and the support of her fans, expressing joy and gratitude.

The upcoming live is the first step towards this. She explains how this is the start of a new chapter for Takane Lui and she’s already thinking ahead to future lives. The title of this live is "Luminous Stairs". Her main focus is to ascend these brilliant stairs.

She emphasizes the importance of fan participation through applications and attendance to support her.

The live's title is "REBELLION," a word that has many meanings to her. It embodies her anxieties, the voices of criticism, and her own inner conflicts, which she wants to overcome through her music. I'll be certain to capture the nuance.

She's putting a lot of effort into making this live amazing and wants the fans to be excited.

New artist photos have been released, and she intends to use these for her artist activities.

There will also be a mini-album release after the live, which includes new songs.

The mini-album, titled "LEGENDARY," will include a new song to be performed at the live.

The Limited Edition of the mini-album will have a hand-signed autograph. This is something she will make sure to offer to her fans.

She expresses her gratitude and reminds the audience about the affordable Regular Edition.

The hashtag for the live and the mini-album is '#TakaneLuiNoHangyaku,' which will be used to promote the album. She also states the album's visuals are excellent.

There will also be some more announcements, including new merchandise.

In summary, this is her 2026 Birthday Celebration!
